title: acmella nuttaliana
intro: Acmella nuttaliana, also known as the 'Parlor Spider Flower' or 'Hairy Balls,' is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Acmella nuttaliana include reducing pain and inflammation, improving oral health by reducing plaque and gum inflammation, and enhancing digestion. Acmella nuttaliana is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used as a topical cream or oil due to its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties.
